skills.name: Restoration
skills.description: Activate your aura to heal yourself and allies nearby.
skills.effect_text:
Heal Factor: CaptionRatio % per 3 seconds
Aura Duration: 60 seconds

skills.name: Barrier
skills.description: Push enemies away and create a barrier of protection that doesn't allow others to enter for some time. Increases the magic defense of allies who are inside the barrier. (Duration halves in PVP areas)
skills.effect_text:
Magic Defense: + CaptionRatio %
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Conviction
skills.description: Attacks an enemy marking them as a traitor. Enemies attacked receives more damage from Fire, Ice, Lightning, Earth, and Poison property attack. Deals 20% increased damage to a stunned enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
+ CaptionRatio2 % damage received from property attacks when affected by [Conviction]
[Conviction] Duration: CaptionTime seconds
20% additional damage dealt to enemies afflicted with [Stun]

skills.name: Sanctuary
skills.description: Increases allies' Physical and Magic Defense within the range proportionally to the caster's Physical and Magic Defense. Also, additional damage is applied as much as the increased DEF when attacking.
skills.effect_text:
Increases Physical Defense by: CaptionRatio %
Increases Magic Defense by: CaptionRatio %
Maximum Duration: 10 seconds
Consumes CaptionRatio3 SP per second

skills.name: Demolition
skills.description: Strike the enemy hard by holding weapon with two hands. Deals increased damage to enemies under the Conviction debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 7
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Increases damage to enemies under Conviction debuff by CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Stone Skin
skills.description: Strengthen your skin to reduce the damage received from physical and magic attacks.

attributes.name: Conviction: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Conviction] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Barrier: Devotion
attributes.description:
* [Barrier] is changed to channeling skill (maximum duration: 10 seconds)

* When the party member inside the [Barrier] gets damage, Paladin receives the damage instead

* Does not consume caster's durability when having Barrier effect while attribute is activated

* Increases Cooldown by 30 seconds

(Existing Barrier magic circle removes when activating the attribute)

attributes.name: Demolition: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Demolition] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Demolition: Stun
attributes.description: * Enemies hit by [Demolition] have a 1% chance per attribute level to be afflicted with [Stun]

attributes.name: Stone Skin: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Stone Skin]'s physical and magic damage taken reducing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Restoration: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the heal factor of [Restoration] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added bonus at maximum level

attributes.name: Sanctuary: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Sanctuary]'s physical and magic defense increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Magical Stat: Paladin
attributes.description:
* Stat Growth Ratio of Paladin is changed.

* STR ↔ INT, DEX ↔ SPR

* Skill property of Paladin is changed to magic

attributes.name: [Arts] Barrier: Holy Ground
attributes.description:
* Damage taken while inside [Barrier] is reduced by 20%, and damage taken through [Barrier: Devotion] is reduced by 50%.

* The arts effect is not activated if you do not have the [Barrier] skill.

attributes.name: [Arts] Restoration: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Restoration] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Conviction: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Conviction] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Demolition: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Demolition] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Restoration: Spirit
attributes.description: * [Restoration] recovers SP by [skill level x 30] instead of recovering HP

attributes.name: Sanctuary: Release
attributes.description:
* Increase in physical, magic defense is changed to [20 + skill level x 4]%

* Immune to removable debuffs

* Holy water consumption is changed to 2

attributes.name: Sanctuary: Liberty(Physical)
attributes.description:
* Changed to target the party member to cast, and the following effect is applied instead

* Physical Defense +[skill level x 5]%

*Immune to removable debuffs

Duration: 15 seconds

* [Sanctuary: Weaken] debuff is applied when the buff disappears

* [Sanctuary: Weaken]: Cannot receive Sanctuary buff for 20 seconds

attributes.name: Sanctuary: Liberty(Magic)
attributes.description:
* Changed to target the party member to cast, and the following effect is applied instead

* Magic Defense +[skill level x 5]%

*Movement Speed +5

Duration: 15 seconds

* [Sanctuary: Weaken] debuff is applied when the buff disappears

* [Sanctuary: Weaken]: Cannot receive Sanctuary buff for 20 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Conviction: Radiance
attributes.description:
* [Conviction] can only attack single target, and heal the party member in a circle 100 range

* Heal factor is 1/10 of [Conviction] factor

* Increases cooldown by 15 seconds
